modules.title: Desktop
modules.description: Workspace landing surface with switchable Windows/macOS chrome, draggable icons, taskbar/dock, and live CTOX activity notifications.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-desktop"><defs><linearGradient id="grad-desktop" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#94a3b8" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3b82f6" /></linearGradient></defs><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="3" ry="3" fill="url(#grad-desktop)" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="url(#grad-desktop)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></rect><path d="M12 17v4M8 21h8" stroke="url(#grad-desktop)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><rect x="5" y="6" width="6" height="4" rx="1" fill="url(#grad-desktop)" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="url(#grad-desktop)" stroke-width="1"></rect><rect x="13" y="6" width="6" height="8" rx="1" fill="url(#grad-desktop)" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="url(#grad-desktop)" stroke-width="1"></rect><rect x="5" y="12" width="6" height="2" rx="0.5" fill="url(#grad-desktop)" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="url(#grad-desktop)" stroke-width="1"></rect></svg>
layout.center: desktop surface

store.summary: Workspace landing surface with switchable Windows/macOS chrome, draggable icons, taskbar/dock, and live CTOX activity notifications.

modules.title: CTOX
modules.description: Native control surface for queues, runs, sync state, and agent context.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-ctox" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="grad-ctox" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#10b981" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#06b6d4" /></linearGradient></defs><polygon points="12 2 22 8 22 16 12 22 2 16 2 8" fill="url(#grad-ctox)" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="url(#grad-ctox)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></polygon><polyline points="12 22 12 12 22 8" stroke="url(#grad-ctox)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></polyline><polyline points="12 12 2 8" stroke="url(#grad-ctox)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></polyline><polyline points="12 2 12 12" stroke="url(#grad-ctox)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="2 2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></polyline><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3.5" fill="url(#grad-ctox)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1"></circle></svg>
layout.center: active workbench

store.summary: Native control surface for queues, runs, sync state, and agent context.

modules.title: Bugs & Features
modules.description: Historical bug and feature request tracker with CTOX acceptance, change evidence, screenshots, and module rollback actions.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-reports" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="grad-reports" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ef4444" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f97316" /></linearGradient></defs><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" fill="url(#grad-reports)" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="url(#grad-reports)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></rect><path d="M18 17V10M12 17V6M6 17v-4" stroke="url(#grad-reports)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><circle cx="12" cy="6" r="2" fill="#ffffff" stroke="url(#grad-reports)" stroke-width="1.2"></circle></svg>

store.summary: Historical bug and feature request tracker with CTOX acceptance, change evidence, screenshots, and module rollback actions.

modules.title: Tickets
modules.description: Native CTOX ticket operations surface for synchronized tickets, routed cases, self-work, approvals, verification, and writeback evidence.

layout.left: ticket inbox, source and state filters
layout.center: selected ticket timeline and case evidence
layout.right: case controls, self-work, approval, verification and writeback context

store.summary: Read-only CTOX ticket operations app over native RxDB/WebRTC ticket projections.

modules.title: Documents

modules.description: Knowledge-backed research dashboards with source scoring, portfolio maps, and CTOX systematic-research handoff.

modules.title: Matching
modules.description: Generic matching workspace with configurable source parsing, object parsing, and CTOX match tasks.

modules.title: Conversations
modules.description: Read-only audit surface for all CTOX communication across WhatsApp, Jami, Email, and MS Teams. Contact-centric timeline with channel-aware rendering and cross-links into Outbound, Matching, and Reports.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-conversations" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="grad-conversations" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4f46e5" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7c3aed" /></linearGradient></defs><path d="M21 11.5a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9 3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1-7.6 4.7 8.38 8.38 0 0 1-3.8-.9L3 21l1.9-5.7a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9-3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1 4.7-7.6 8.38 8.38 0 0 1 3.8-.9h.5a8.48 8.48 0 0 1 8 8v.5z" fill="url(#grad-conversations)" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="url(#grad-conversations)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><circle cx="9" cy="11" r="1.5" fill="url(#grad-conversations)"></circle><circle cx="13" cy="11" r="1.5" fill="url(#grad-conversations)"></circle><circle cx="17" cy="11" r="1.5" fill="url(#grad-conversations)"></circle></svg>

layout.center: Selected conversation timeline with channel-aware messages
layout.right: Contact card, related business records, and CTOX agent attribution

store.summary: Read-only audit surface for all CTOX communication across WhatsApp, Jami, Email, and MS Teams. Contact-centric timeline with channel-aware rendering and cross-links into Outbound, Matching, and Reports.

modules.title: Support
modules.description: Native CTOX Support Desk for omnichannel support queues, customer context, ticket links, SLA, macros, and CTOX Harness-assisted drafts.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-support" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" rx="14" fill="#101827"></rect><path d="M18 24c0-7.2 5.8-13 13-13h2c7.2 0 13 5.8 13 13v7.4c0 6.7-5.4 12.1-12.1 12.1H32l-9.5 7.7v-8.4A10.8 10.8 0 0 1 18 34V24Z" fill="#3DDC97"></path><path d="M25 25.5h14M25 32h10.5" stroke="#101827" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"></path></svg>
layout.left: Support queue, saved views, and channel filters
layout.center: Selected support conversation timeline and composer
layout.right: Customer context, ticket links, SLA, macros, and CTOX Agent suggestions
layout.third_pane_justification: Support operators need customer identity, linked tickets, SLA state, and CTOX suggestions visible while reading and replying; moving this context into drawers would force repeated context switches during every conversation.

store.summary: CTOX-native support desk layered over communication, ticket, customer, and harness projections.

modules.description: Campaign source import, company qualification, and pipeline handoff for outbound sales workflows.

modules.title: Kunden
modules.description: Native CRM-App fuer Bestandskunden, Kontakte, Opportunities, Aufgaben, Notizen, Aktivitaeten und Outbound-Handoffs.

modules.title: Notizen
modules.description: Premium local-first markdown note workspace matching macOS Notes aesthetic.

modules.title: Zugangsdaten
modules.description: Write-only manager for provider credentials and API keys. Values are stored in the encrypted CTOX secret store and are never read back into the browser.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-credentials" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="grad-credentials" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#14b8a6" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6366f1" /></linearGradient></defs><path d="M12 2l8 3v6c0 5-3.5 8-8 11-4.5-3-8-6-8-11V5l8-3z" fill="url(#grad-credentials)" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="url(#grad-credentials)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="2.4" stroke="url(#grad-credentials)" stroke-width="2"></circle><path d="M12 12.4V16" stroke="url(#grad-credentials)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"></path></svg>
layout.center: Set, rotate and remove credentials

store.summary: Write-only credentials manager backed by the encrypted CTOX secret store. Set, rotate and remove provider credentials; values never leave the daemon.

modules.title: App Creator
modules.description: Native standalone code-generator & harness workbench to visualize and test custom Business-OS modules.

modules.title: IoT
modules.description: CTOX IoT delegation app (RFC 0011): a 2-pane workspace where you task CTOX in free text (Wenn/Dann) to watch your signals and act. LEFT = asset/signal tree (right-click a signal to create an order or a webhook source). CENTER = dashboards of automation widgets; each widget is one standing order CTOX programs in three editable parts — ① Trigger-Logik (a sandboxed Rhai watcher that fires per datapoint in the backend), ② Widget-Code (render_code in a sandboxed iframe), ③ Auftrags-Prompt (spawns a chat on fire). Reads iot_* projections only and writes via business_commands; webhooks in & out. The actual trigger/render code is generated by CTOX (model-driven), never a heuristic template.

layout.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" class="svg-icon svg-iot" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="grad-iot" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0f766e" /><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2563eb" /></linearGradient></defs><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" fill="url(#grad-iot)" fill-opacity="0.18" stroke="url(#grad-iot)" stroke-width="2"></circle><path d="M7.8 7.8a6 6 0 0 0 0 8.4M16.2 7.8a6 6 0 0 1 0 8.4" stroke="url(#grad-iot)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"></path><path d="M5 5a10 10 0 0 0 0 14M19 5a10 10 0 0 1 0 14" stroke="url(#grad-iot)" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-opacity="0.7"></path></svg>
layout.left: Realm scope selector, asset hierarchy tree and search/filter
layout.center: Selected asset typed-attribute workbench, live values, native datapoint chart and optional map
layout.right: Open alarms, ruleset status and protocol agent / connection context

store.summary: Native IoT asset & telemetry workspace (assets, attributes, datapoints, alarms, rulesets, MQTT agent) with multi-realm isolation, bounded/coalesced telemetry and secret redaction. Ported from OpenRemote. DEFERRED (planned, not broken): Groovy/JS/Flow rule execution, non-MQTT protocol agents, forecasting, and gateway federation.
